title: Duvalia mastodes
taxonomy: Duvalia mastodes is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. It belongs to the genus Duvalia, which includes a group of succulent plants native to South Africa. The Apocynaceae family is a large and diverse group of plants that also includes dogbane, oleander, and periwinkle. Duvalia mastodes is a succulent plant that has adapted to survive in dry conditions, storing water in its leaves. The classification of Duvalia mastodes reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary history.
